document.title: Careful Scientific Claim Demo
document.text:
# Careful Scientific Claim Demo

## Abstract

We evaluate CappinCheck on a curated benchmark of technical-document claims. CappinCheck improved from 84.1% to 87.3% on Benchmark X, a 3.2 percentage-point gain under the benchmark conditions.

## Results

| System | Benchmark X accuracy |
| --- | ---: |
| Baseline | 84.1% |
| CappinCheck | 87.3% |

## Limitations

The result is limited to the curated Benchmark X dataset. The evaluation does not establish real-world deployment performance, legal-document performance, clinical-document performance, or user preference.

claims.claim: CappinCheck improved from 84.1% to 87.3% on Benchmark X, a 3.2 percentage-point gain under the benchmark conditions.
claims.why_risky: Numeric claims are worth checking even when they appear carefully scoped.
claims.audit_question: Do the reported table values support the stated absolute improvement?

claims.claim: The evaluation does not establish real-world deployment performance.
claims.why_risky: This is a caveat claim; the audit should preserve it if the document states the limitation.
claims.audit_question: Does the document explicitly limit the conclusion to benchmark evaluation?

claims.claim: The result is limited to the curated Benchmark X dataset.
claims.why_risky: Scope-limiting claims should be supported by the document's evaluation description.
claims.audit_question: Does the document avoid broad generalization beyond Benchmark X?

supporting_evidence.relevance: The source wording matches the table and keeps the scope limited to Benchmark X.
